scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/server
